title: Combatting Hate Against Muslims fund: prospectus
body: "The Combatting Hate Against Muslims fund will support organisations to map a more accurate record of hate incidents affecting Muslims across England, helping to combat anti-Muslim hate.  The prospectus includes:    ​a summary of key information about the grant  ​the grant’s objectives  ​who can apply for the grant​  the amount of funding available  assessment criteria   timeline  "
